title: Lordphenex Bee Tooltip
description: A small datapack to display beehive and bee nest contents in their tooltip
body:
﻿This simple datapack adds a tooltip to beehive and beenest that let you know how many bees and honey are in these blocks.

Note that the datapack changes default loot tables for beehive and bee nest and may be incompatible with some other datapacks.
